category.name: Crawlability
category.rule: 8 URL(s) point to different domain(s) Items (5/8): - https://aryaintaran.com [host: aryaintaran.com] - https://aryaintaran.com/projects [host: aryaintaran.com] - https://aryaintaran.com/about [host: aryaintaran.com] - https://aryaintaran.com/contact [host: aryaintaran.com] - https://aryaintaran.com/privacy-policy [host: aryaintaran.com]
8 indexable page(s) not in sitemap (100%); 8 sitemap URL(s) were not crawled Items (5/16): - / - /about - /contact - /projects - /privacy-policy

category.name: Security
category.rule: Page not served over HTTPS Pages (5/8): /, /about, /contact, /privacy-policy, /projects
1 public form(s) without CAPTCHA Pages (1): / Items (1): - form[0]

category.name: Content
category.rule: N word(s) may be overused Pages (3): /, /privacy-policy, /projects Items (5): - project ("project" (4.6%)) [count: 9, density: 4.615384615384616] - developer ("developer" (3.6%)) [count: 7, density: 3.5897435897435894] - support ("support" (3.1%)) [count: 6, density: 3.076923076923077] - data ("data" (3.1%)) [count: 6, density: 3.076923076923077] - contact ("contact" (3.9%)) [count: 10, density: 3.861003861003861]

Thin content: N words (min N) Pages (5/7): /, /about, /contact, /projects, /projects/ai-content-generator Items (5/7): - / (Thin content: 238 words (min 300)) - /about (Thin content: 264 words (min 300)) - /contact (Thin content: 264 words (min 300)) - /projects (Thin content: 100 words (min 300)) - /projects/e-commerce (Thin content: 48 words (min 300))

category.name: Images
category.rule: N image(s) missing width/height (causes CLS) Pages (2): /, /about Items (2): - /_next/image?url=%2Fhero-portrait.webp&w=3840&q=75 | - /_next/image?url=%2Fhero-portrait.webp&w=3840&q=75 |

category.name: Performance

category.name: Accessibility
category.rule: N potential color contrast issue(s) Pages (5/8): /, /about, /contact, /privacy-policy, /projects Items (5/24): - span with class "text-[10px] font-semibold trac..." may have low contrast - p with class "text-xl leading-relaxed text-m..." may have low contrast - p with class "text-muted-foreground mt-4 max..." may have low contrast - div with class "mt-10 flex items-center gap-3 ..." may have low contrast - p with class "text-xl text-muted-foreground ..." may have low contrast
